Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wavedancer]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Wavedancer is a double-edged blade with runes stylized to look like crashing waves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Wavedancer's Archlord spirit is graceful and it has no binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Dross moves the flying Wavedancer to block a punch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Wavedancer is a weapon that sits next to Lindon when he wakes up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Wavedancer is Lindon's flying sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses Wavedancer to block attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Wavedancer is a sword that can act as a shield.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Wavedancer is a flying sword crafted from the blues and greens of wind and waves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Wavedancer is an Archlord flying sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Wavedancer is a flying sword.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Wavedancer is used to carve a binding like a smooth pearl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Wavedancer follows Lindon but is sluggish in the current aura.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon summoned Wavedancer.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Wavedancer speared into the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Wavedancer was Lindon's prize from the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Wavedancer holds crackling blue-and-gold power and storm madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Wavedancer can create eight clones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 38''' — Wavedancer is an entity or artifact that unleashes a golden dragon's breath.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Wavedancer appeared over Lindon's head as a flying sword.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
